picks.title: Saddle crossing
picks.reason: A ridge saddle near 2070 ft — deer cross ridges at their low gaps, funneling travel between bedding areas. Prime stand.

picks.title: South-face beds
picks.reason: SSE-facing bench near 2051 ft, ~25° — thermal sun and a downhill escape; Penn State collar deer bed exactly this.
